title: Best Beginner Fruit
description: Choose a fruit that gives easy farming, good range, and simple damage so you can level up faster in the early game.

title: How to Level Up Fast
description: Focus on quests, kill mobs efficiently, move island by island, and use active codes whenever possible for extra help.

title: Best Sword Build
description: Use your strongest sword, invest your stats carefully, and avoid wasting resources on weak items early.

title: How to Farm Bosses
description: Learn boss spawn locations, use a strong build, and repeat the easiest profitable boss fights for faster progression.
